changelog.title: Resolve MEM0_API_KEY resolution and allow copy of specific terminal log lines
highlights: Added fallback to load .env in memory.py, fixed config_loader tests, and added hover copy buttons to individual dashboard log lines.

changelog.title: Restore CPU power estimation fallback
highlights: Restored CPU power estimation math when hardware sensor readings are unavailable so that CPU wattage shows up on the HUD.

changelog.title: Alternate Switch Account between Google and Discord
highlights: Configured Switch Account in Settings to sign out and auto-login with Google/Discord depending on the current provider.

changelog.title: Fix HUD scan and remove Stealth Mode
highlights: Prevented HUD window from triggering get_cached_games to avoid backend auto-scan.
Removed Stealth Mode tray menu options, window protection logic, and settings panel.

changelog.title: Responsive UI, tray events, env var loading, and Electron memory optimization
highlights: Enforced 256MB V8 heap limit & exposed GC to optimize Electron memory usage on 16GB RAM setups.
Added single-click system tray handler to toggle app visibility.
Ensured env variables override system environment to fix NVIDIA_API_KEY loading.
Removed scaling clamp from frontend CSS to fix zoomed-out responsive scaling.
Renamed 'Ack Engine' to 'Acknowledge' in Updater UI.

changelog.title: Fix FPS disparity with OBS capture and improve ETW precision
highlights: Fixed FPS reporting disparity when OBS is recording by capturing all DXGI Present event APIs (42, 46, 73, 78)
Resolved ETW state corruption by ignoring bogus microscopic intervals without updating the last frame timestamp

changelog.title: Release v1.3.8: Fix CPU package temperature and remove fake power math
highlights: Fixed CPU package temperature readings by ignoring misleading Core Max and per-core temp sensors, enabling reliable WMI package fallback
Removed fake CPU power estimation math to prevent misleading HUD telemetry when hardware readings are unavailable

changelog.title: Release v1.3.7: Fix frontend compilation and include missed UI updates
highlights: Release v1.3.7: Fix frontend compilation and include missed UI updates

changelog.title: Release v1.3.6: Fixed Updater caching, file locks, and applied all UI and GPU power fixes
highlights: Fixed update caching by adding Cache-Control headers to local server and clearing Chromium session cache on startup
Synchronized backend process tree termination on exit to prevent installer file lock conflicts
Fixed GPU power draw reporting by capping it at TGP limit
Implemented continuous responsive DPI scaling (1080p, 1200p, 1440p, 1600p, 4K) using viewport-based clamp
Added immediate account switching button in Settings and removed Microsoft Auth
Aligned Stealth Mode and updated Check For Updates icon in System Tray
Bypassed game library rescan when opening HUD overlay

changelog.title: Release v1.3.5: Final Authentication, Tray Icon, DPI Scaling, and GPU Power Fixes
highlights: Fixed GPU power draw reporting by capping it at TGP limit
Implemented continuous responsive DPI scaling (1080p, 1200p, 1440p, 1600p, 4K) using viewport-based clamp
Added immediate account switching button in Settings and removed Microsoft Auth
Aligned Stealth Mode and updated Check For Updates icon in System Tray
Bypassed game library rescan when opening HUD overlay
Fixed updater modal hang by auto-reloading UI on successful update installation
Fixed CPU clock speed dynamic PDH query thread-safety

changelog.title: Upgraded some minor changes
highlights: Upgraded some minor changes

changelog.title: Authentication updates, tray alignment, DPI scaling, and GPU power fixes
highlights: Fixed GPU power draw reporting by capping it at TGP limit
Implemented continuous responsive DPI scaling (1080p, 1200p, 1440p, 1600p, 4K) using viewport-based clamp
Added immediate account switching button in Settings and removed Microsoft Auth
Aligned Stealth Mode and updated Check For Updates icon in System Tray
Bypassed game library rescan when opening HUD overlay
Fixed updater modal hang by auto-reloading UI on successful update installation
Fixed CPU clock speed dynamic PDH query thread-safety

changelog.title: Fixed Microsoft Auth, CPU clock speed, and Release notes UI
highlights: Fixed Microsoft Auth, CPU clock speed, and Release notes UI

changelog.title: Optimized Electron memory footprint for 16GB RAM systems & Fixed Google Auth Fallback
highlights: Optimized Electron memory footprint for 16GB RAM systems & Fixed Google Auth Fallback

changelog.title: Fixed Google sign-in username display issue
highlights: Fixed Google sign-in username display issue

changelog.title: Fixed HUD focus loss and games database path in window detector
highlights: Fixed HUD focus loss and games database path in window detector

changelog.title: Avatar fix, provider-switch scan reset, uninstall registry speedup
highlights: Avatar now loads from Google/Discord CDN with onError initials fallback
Scan overlay no longer sticks when switching OAuth provider (Discord to Google)
Uninstall registry scan phase cut from 30s+ to under 1s by removing disk walks

changelog.title: Discord auth, sign-out fix, Ubisoft Connect detection
highlights: Discord OAuth display name now shows Discord tag and provider label in sidebar
Fixed Library page getting stuck in scan state after signing out
Fixed Ubisoft Connect launcher not appearing after fresh install
Fixed GOG Galaxy and EA Desktop deduplication normalization collision

changelog.title: OAuth Display, Sign-Out Scan Reset, and Ubisoft Connect Fixes
highlights: Resolved Discord OAuth display issues by cascading user name lookup
Fixed Library scan UI getting stuck in scanning state upon user sign-out
Fixed duplicate detection normalization to prevent Ubisoft Connect launcher from being dropped

changelog.title: Fix SQL queries and NIM timeouts
highlights: Included queries, prompts, and RAG data in PyInstaller package
Added client-side request timeouts to prevent Gateway Timeout hangs
Synchronized NIM calls with threading locks to prevent circuit breaker race conditions

changelog.title: Authentication, Update UI, and CPU Thermal Fixes
highlights: Pinned local UI server to fixed port 43221 to ensure Clerk's authentication session persists across restarts.
Removed blocking native OS dialogs from the updater flow so that download progress is tracked live in the Updater Modal.
Switched CPU temperature smoothing to a symmetric EMA to eliminate stuck-at-high readings, and restored Dashboard log rendering.

changelog.title: Mem0 Package Fix
highlights: Bundle mem0 config submodules dynamically in PyInstaller specs.

changelog.title: HUD Crash Fix
highlights: Fixed TypeError: Object has been destroyed in HUD window show/hide handlers.

changelog.title: Production Telemetry & Core Fixes
highlights: Fixed production telemetry by bundling LibreHardwareMonitor DLLs into PyInstaller build.
Fixed CPU temperature reporting by correcting WMI parsing alignment (preventing CPU frequency from being misread as temperature) and removing arbitrary TZ01/TZ02 zone exclusions.
Removed artificial CPU temperature estimation fallback to ensure only real hardware readings are reported.
Migrated website persistence from Sanity to MongoDB/Mongoose.
Fixed Mermaid diagram rendering issues in blog views.

changelog.title: Database Migration and App Cleanup
highlights: Migrated backend database
Fixed mermaid rendering
Cleaned up patch notes

changelog.title: Woodpecker CI/CD Integration
highlights: Migrated CI/CD to Woodpecker CI
Added run_local.ps1 script
Fixed UTF-8 BOM issue in package.json
Fixed NameError: name 'logger' is not defined in updater_bridge.py
